mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address(address_id, user_id, name, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{addressId}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET name = #{name}, detail = #{detail}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = NOW() WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM address WHERE address_id = #{addressId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, address_id, user_id, name, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
